response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or cloud-based GenAI deployment — key requirements for this staff-level role. Her background is more generalist and embedded/web-focused, with limited demonstrated leadership in enterprise AI delivery.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in building scalable, distributed systems across cloud and on-prem
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education, indicating strong communication skills
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI solutions or RAG systems
Limited mention of vector databases, LLM metrics, or cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) in context of GenAI
Education shows BS in CS but no advanced degree; primary language focus is TypeScript/Node.js, not Python

key_factors.factor: Cloud Platform and Vector DB Expertise
